Born in the mountains

Fearless
by nature.

Named for the animal that scales cliffs no other creature will attempt, Markhor carries the resilience of Pakistan's northern peaks into every can — homegrown energy for people who move with purpose.

This redesign turns that heritage into a visual system: glass-panel UI, a gold-and-pine palette pulled from the brand mark, and motion that feels premium rather than decorative.

01

Cinematic Hero

Full-bleed layered visuals with ambient motion replace the static banner slider on the current site.

02

Glass UI System

Frosted, translucent panels carry stats, specs, and CTAs — a modern language distinct from flat colour blocks.

03

Built to Convert

Distributor, retail, and event inquiries route through dedicated funnels — not one generic contact form.

Product Showcase

One can.
Every occasion.

Real product photography, presented in a premium frame — not a flat catalogue shot.

Original

The signature stimulant blend — balanced caffeine, taurine, and a clean citrus finish.

250MLCAFFEINE 80MG

On the Go

Twin-pack format built for retail counters and quick top-ups between deliveries.

2 x 250MLCAFFEINE 80MG

Everyday Price

Positioned to out-value imported energy brands without compromising on presentation.

RS 2993-PACK
Always Cold, Always Ready

Cold drinks,
on demand.

Chilled Retail CoolersBranded cooler placement across partner stores keeps Markhor front-of-fridge, not back-of-shelf.
Store LocatorA live map on the new site shows the nearest cold Markhor — reducing lost sales to substitution.
Route-to-Market SupportDistributor-facing tools for stock, delivery scheduling, and cooler servicing requests.
